name: Orion|| Beastman Market
description:
Orion is a Beast Man available for purchase.

Notes:

I completely updated Orion's personality and added more to him to make him more fleshed out. His first message and scenario are all the same but he should be more well rounded now. I am working on lorebooks for this series, but I am hopeless with coding so it will take me some time to put them into affect.
